message:
feat(http): add Request/Response builder API with fluent method chaining

Add RequestBuilder and ResponseBuilder types providing an ergonomic
fluent API for constructing HTTP/1.1 requests and responses. This
replaces the need to manually construct Request/Response structs with
all fields specified.

RequestBuilder supports: method shortcut constructors (get/post/put/
delete/patch/head/options), header(), body(), version(), query(),
path_params(), peer_addr(), and build(). Response builder supports:
status(), header(), body(), version(), and build().

Add convenience constructors on Request (get/post/put/delete/builder)
and Response (ok/not_found/bad_request/internal_server_error/builder)
that return builders.

Export RequestBuilder and ResponseBuilder from http::h1::mod.rs.

Includes comprehensive unit tests covering builder defaults, method
chaining, body types, header accumulation, and response shortcut
constructors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
